fields.title: Implement TUI rendering for agent tool
fields.description:
Create renderCall and renderResult for the agent tool.

## Deliverables
- src/agent/render.ts

## Render Requirements

### renderCall
Minimal - hide like current task tool (return empty Text)

### renderResult
Show based on action:

**spawn:**
```
✔ agent spawn code:medium → abc-123
```

**send:**
```
✔ agent send abc-123 (submission: sub-456)
```

**wait:**
```
✔ agent wait (2 agents)
  abc-123: completed - "Done implementing feature"
  def-456: running
```

**close:**
```
✔ agent close abc-123 → shutdown
```

**list:**
```
✔ agent list (3 agents)
  abc-123 code:medium    running
  def-456 search:low     completed
  ghi-789 review:high    pending
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] renderCall returns minimal/empty output
- [ ] renderResult shows action-appropriate summary
- [ ] Status shown with color (success=green, error=red, running=yellow)
- [ ] Structured output shown truncated in wait result
- [ ] Expanded view shows full details
- [ ] Matches existing tau render patterns
fields.notes: Simpler than current task/render.ts - no batch complexity.
fields.close_reason: Implemented and migrated non-blocking agent system
